scope: Pass B full-surface expansion: Persona's live-published OpenAPI 3.1 spec was fetched directly during this review (docs.withpersona.com/openapi/api-reference.json, 169 distinct paths / 204 method+path operations). This bundle keeps the 5 legacy-parity read streams (inquiries, accounts, reports, transactions, cases) and adds every dialect-expressible write action confirmed, per-endpoint, from the live OpenAPI requestBody schema to have NO required top-level body field (an empty/absent JSON body, or a body with only optional properties, is a genuinely valid request): the 5 resource-level DELETE (redact) actions, Inquiry lifecycle approve/decline/expire/resume, and 4 more discovered directly from the spec during this pass -- Report re-run/pause/resume-monitoring and Transaction redact-biometrics (none of these have any requestBody 'required' entries per the live spec; approve/decline's optional 'meta' property and the others' fully-empty schemas both qualify as body_type:none in this dialect). Every OTHER mutation this review inspected (create/update on every resource, add-tag/remove-tag/set-tags, add/remove-relation, cases' add-objects/remove-objects/assign/set-status, accounts' consolidate/run-action, transactions' label, inquiries' mark-for-review/set-simulate-stubs/perform-simulate-actions) requires a non-empty 'data' and/or 'meta' envelope object per the live schema (confirmed by inspecting each operation's requestBody.content.application/json.schema.properties directly) -- the engine's WriteAction dialect has no body-envelope/wrapper mechanism (WriteAction always sends either the record's own fields as a flat JSON body, or an explicit body_fields allow-list of top-level keys; there is no way to nest either under a named 'data'/'meta' wrapper key) -- see Known limits in docs.md for the full ENGINE_GAP writeup. Verifications/Documents/Devices/Webhooks/API-Keys/Lists/List-Items/Importers/Workflows/Connect/Relay/Graph/OAuth/Case-Templates/Account-Types/Transaction-Types/User-Audit-Logs/API-Logs/Rate-Limits/Inquiry-Sessions/Inquiry-Templates/Privacy-Passes and the entire simulate/sandbox-testing action group are excluded as out_of_scope breadth-vs-cost triage for this pass (not legacy-modeled, and each is its own multi-endpoint subsystem or admin/sandbox-scoped operation outside this bundle's core verification/identity-data focus); single-object detail-by-id GETs that duplicate an already-covered list stream's record shape are excluded as duplicate_of; PDF/print endpoints are binary_payload.

excluded.reason: ENGINE_GAP: create-an-inquiry's live OpenAPI requestBody schema nests fields under top-level 'data'/'meta' properties, which the WriteAction dialect cannot express (no body-envelope/wrapper mechanism)

ENGINE_GAP: add-tag's live requestBody schema requires a nested 'meta' object carrying the tag value, which WriteAction cannot express as anything but a flat top-level field
